content.question: The scope and current enforceability of the pre-2010 requirement for independent expert assessment before school closure is not confirmed in force or codified in the current Nkt. or subordinate regulations; it is unclear whether this procedural gate remains mandatory, optional, or obsolete.
content.reduction_path: A current official interpretation from the Education Ombudsman office or the Education Ministry (EMMI) clarifying whether Nkt. § 83 consultation requirements encompass the substance of an independent expert assessment, or whether such assessment is now subsumed under 'stakeholder opinion' requirements.
